subcodes.first_line: The men and heroes of the world are witnessed today to be heedless of the Truth, notwithstanding that they were created for this Day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رجال و ابطال عالم الیوم از حق غافل مشاهده میشوند مع آنکه از برای این یوم خلق
subcodes.subjects: @belief and denial, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @knowledge; recognition of God, @interconnectedness; all things involved in all things; chain of being, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @suffering and imprisonment
